# Pragmata Contains a Stage That's a 'Fake New York Generated by AI,' but It's Entirely Made by Humans

**技术信号** | IGN Game News | 2026-03-27

[原文链接](https://www.ign.com/articles/pragmata-contains-a-stage-thats-a-fake-new-york-generated-by-ai-but-its-entirely-made-by-humans)

## 摘要

In the latest interview from the dev team behind Pragmata, they said that they're hand-crafting one of the levels in the game to look like it was AI-generated, despite it being fully made by humans.
